ismg.criterion: Creating a multimodal presentation in Italian — Multimodal presentation

descriptors:
• comprehension of ideas in three stimulus texts in Italian related to the present and/or future
choices

• comprehension of ideas in two stimulus texts in Italian related to the present and/or future
choices

• some comprehension of ideas in one stimulus text in Italian related to the present and/or
future choices
The student response does not match any of the descriptors above.

ismg.criterion: Creating a multimodal presentation in Italian — Responding (language elements)

descriptors:
• constructs meaning by applying comprehensive and complex knowledge of language
elements in a multimodal presentation with minor errors in the use of
- wide range of vocabulary
- wide range of grammar
- pronunciation
- consistent register
- intonation

• constructs meaning by applying comprehensive knowledge of language elements in a
multimodal presentation with minor errors in the use of
- wide range of vocabulary
- wide range of grammar
- pronunciation
- register
- intonation

• constructs meaning by applying knowledge of language elements in a multimodal
presentation with minor errors in the use of
- range of vocabulary
- range of grammar
- pronunciation
- register
- intonation

• constructs meaning by applying some knowledge of language elements with some errors in
a multimodal presentation in the use of
- vocabulary
- grammar
- pronunciation
- register
- intonation
• repetitive use of Italian language elements and vocabulary in a multimodal presentation
• fragmented use of Italian
The student response does not match any of the descriptors above.

ismg.criterion: Creating a multimodal presentation in Italian — Responding (communication)

descriptors:
• communicates with discerning selection, sequencing and synthesis of information from the
stimulus texts to justify conclusions, ideas and perspectives appropriate to the task and text
type of multimodal presentation

• communicates with effective selection, sequencing and synthesis of information from the
stimulus texts to justify conclusions, ideas and perspectives appropriate to the task of the
multimodal presentation

• communicates with selection, sequencing and synthesis of information from the stimulus
texts to justify conclusions, ideas and perspectives appropriate to the task of the multimodal
presentation

• communicates with some selection and sequencing of information from the stimulus texts
with some justification of conclusions/ideas/perspectives appropriate to the task of the
multimodal presentation

• a multimodal presentation with some selection and sequencing of information/ideas from
the stimulus texts
• disjointed use of Italian
The student response does not match any of the descriptors above.

ismg.criterion: Exchanging information and ideas in Italian — Creating and responding

descriptors: • thorough and discerning responses to the open, unseen interview questions
• thorough responses to the open, unseen interview questions
• relevant responses to the open, unseen interview questions, with some errors
• mostly relevant responses to the open, unseen interview questions, with errors
• fragmented engagement with the questions posed
The student response does not match any of the descriptors above.

ismg.criterion: Exchanging information and ideas in Italian — Language elements

descriptors:
• constructs meaning in an interview by applying comprehensive knowledge of language
elements with minor errors in the use of
- wide range of vocabulary
- wide range of grammar
- pronunciation
- consistent register
- intonation

• constructs meaning in an interview by applying knowledge of language elements with minor
errors in the use of
- range of vocabulary
- range of grammar
- pronunciation
- register
- intonation

• constructs meaning in an interview by applying some knowledge of language elements with
some errors in the use of
- vocabulary
- grammar
- pronunciation
- register
- intonation

• uses some Italian language in an interview, including repetitive use of
- vocabulary
- grammar
• fragmented use of Italian in an interview
The student response does not match any of the descriptors above.

ismg.criterion: Exchanging information and ideas in Italian — Communication

descriptors:
• demonstrates discerning selection and sequencing of ideas in an interview with proficiency
and spontaneity

• demonstrates effective selection and sequencing of ideas in an interview with proficiency
and spontaneity
• demonstrates selection and sequencing of ideas in an interview with some proficiency

• demonstrates fragmented selection and sequencing of ideas in an interview, or delivers a
set of rehearsed responses
• disjointed use of Italian
The student response does not match any of the descriptors above.
